defmodule MyApp.Reports do
  def daily(events) do
    events
    |> Enum.filter(&relevant?/1)
    |> Enum.map(&normalize/1)
    |> Enum.group_by(& &1.bucket)
    |> Enum.map(fn {bucket, rows} -> {bucket, summarize(rows)} end)
    |> Enum.sort_by(& elem(&1, 0))
    |> Enum.map(&format_row/1)
    |> Enum.join("\n")
  end
end

defmodule MyApp.Reports do
  def daily(events) do
    events
    |> Enum.filter(&relevant?/1)
    |> Enum.map(&normalize/1)
    |> summarize_buckets()
  end
end

defmodule MyApp.Reports do
  def daily(events) do
    grouped =
      events
      |> Enum.filter(&relevant?/1)
      |> Enum.map(&normalize/1)
      |> Enum.group_by(& &1.bucket)

    grouped
    |> Enum.map(fn {bucket, rows} -> {bucket, summarize(rows)} end)
    |> Enum.sort_by(&elem(&1, 0))
    |> Enum.map(&format_row/1)
    |> Enum.join("\n")
  end
end
